title: Magic, Adventures and Creatures
description: A modest, vanilla expanding, fantasy modpack with origins.
body:
This was initially created for a private server, but I thought others might be interested in a similar pack!

While the pack does stray from vanilla, it's still limited in scope. Aside from Origins, it doesn't really add too much that's a big change. Most things can be crafted from vanilla materials.

Made with fun interactions in mind. For example, a small character meets a bigger one, how are they able to show off their house? Well just give them a shrinking potion and they'll fit right through your one-block door!

Self expression in a fantasy theme was a main focus!

**This pack is no longer maintained. You can download it as is, without updates or support**
